title: ngrok Endpoint
description: An Endpoint represents a public URL that routes traffic to a tunnel or edge configuration in the ngrok network.

region.description: The ngrok region where the endpoint is hosted.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the endpoint was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the endpoint was last updated.

public_url.description: The public URL of the endpoint.

proto.description: The protocol of the endpoint (http, https, tcp, tls).

type.description: The type of the endpoint (ephemeral, edge, cloud).

domain.description: Reference to the reserved domain, if applicable.

tcp_addr.description: Reference to the reserved TCP address, if applicable.

tunnel.description: Reference to the tunnel serving this endpoint.

edge.description: Reference to the edge serving this endpoint.

traffic_policy.description: The traffic policy attached to this endpoint.

uri.description: URI of the endpoint API resource.
